description: Create a comprehensive GitHub Actions workflow named VCMI that triggers on push to features/*, beta, master, and develop branches, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow should have a matrix build job that runs on multiple platforms (linux, macos, windows) with various configurations, including different operating systems, compilers, and test settings. For each platform, it should check out the code, set up dependencies, configure and build the project using CMake, run tests, and upload artifacts.
